root.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you?! I need to become a top ranker!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who are you?! I need to become a top ranker!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you?! I need to become a top ranker!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stop resisting!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stop resisting!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stop resisting!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for your cooperation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for your cooperation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for your cooperation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, don't mention it. It's our job to help.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, don't mention it. It's our job to help.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, don't mention it. It's our job to help.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hold on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hold on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hold on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The student's... condition is...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The student's... condition is...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The student's... condition is...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I must...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I must...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I must...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: BECOME A RANKER!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: BECOME A RANKER!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: BECOME A RANKER!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-AAAAARGH!!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-AAAAARGH!!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-AAAAARGH!!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Is that non-Counter using a Counter ability?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Is that non-Counter using a Counter ability?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Is that non-Counter using a Counter ability?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can't find it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can't find it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can't find it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This case might be similar to the Elixir incident.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This case might be similar to the Elixir incident.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This case might be similar to the Elixir incident.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If she manifested CRF without a Watch, then...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If she manifested CRF without a Watch, then...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If she manifested CRF without a Watch, then...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You two should get to somewhere safe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You two should get to somewhere safe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You two should get to somewhere safe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll take it from here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll take it from here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll take it from here.
